steps.title: Compare the two views
steps.content: Text 1 treats Morrison's sermon scenes as evidence of Ellison's direct influence. Text 2 agrees the scenes recall Ellison but adds that they also reflect a broader Black American literary strategy.

steps.title: Identify the missing context
steps.content: B overstates a misunderstanding of other writers, C invents structural and stylistic divergence, and D gives an incoherent description of the claim itself. Text 2 would say Text 1 overlooks the wider cultural context shared by Ellison and Morrison. The answer is A.
